items.title: Being an engineer in the AI era
items.description:
I hesitated to write this.

Not because I don’t have an opinion about AI in software engineering, but because it sometimes feels increasingly difficult to have nuanced conversations about it.

I worked in an environment where being “AI native” was part of the identity. And when a tech

items.title: The Secret to On-Device Intelligence: Mastering Weight Pruning and Sparsity for Mobile NPUs
items.description:
